channel.title: Contents on Aaron's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Contents on Aaron's Blog

item.title: Igris Growth Engine
item.description: Automated self-improvement loop. Every 2h cron, domain rotation, Gemini-powered search+build pipeline. 7am daily Slack digest of new ideas and proposals.

item.title: Igris Pi Runtime Stack
item.description: Igris runs 24/7 on pi5desktop as a Claude Code Slack bot. Local and cloud MCPs, per-thread session memory. Always available, always on.

item.title: Igris Pi Runtime Stack Live
item.description: Igris is now live 24/7 on pi5desktop as a Claude Code Slack bot. The AI advisor is always on, always available — no longer dependent on a laptop session.

item.title: Igris and Voltron Knowledge Bus Live
item.description: Live knowledge sync between Igris and Voltron via n8n workflow. Igris can push and pull structured knowledge to and from the Pi5Security node in real time.

item.title: CTI Dashboard
item.description: Live threat intelligence terminal dashboard. Python. SOC-focused. Planned as a recurring revenue add-on to night audit security workflow.

item.title: Igris OS Dashboard
item.description: Python/Textual terminal dashboard — primary ops center. Panels: Overview, Agents, Memory, Network, Activity, Skills, Chat, Bus, Advisor. Advisor panel has drift tracking and LLM-powered synthesis.

item.title: Pi Homelab — Voltron and Pi5Desktop
item.description: Two Raspberry Pi 5s on Tailscale. Pi5Security (Voltron): Kali Linux, n8n, Grafana, Kismet, Fail2Ban. Pi5Desktop: Ollama (Llama 3.2), Cowrie honeypot, Igris Claude-Code Slack bot. Both hardened: SSH key-only, port 2222, Fail2Ban.

item.title: Pi Homelab Fully Hardened
item.description: Both Pi5s hardened: SSH key-only auth, port 2222, Fail2Ban installed and active, Nginx+n8n in production on pi5desktop, Kali station fully operational on pi5security.

item.title: Legacy Stack Newsletter
item.description: AI Tools for Black Men Who Are Building. Published on Beehiiv. Issue 2 published April 23, 2026.

item.title: Started CYB/445 Risk Assessment
item.description: Began CYB/445 Risk Assessment — active cybersecurity course at University of Phoenix. Target graduation: June 2026.

item.title: PRG/420 Java Programming I — Grade A
item.description: Completed PRG/420 Java Programming I at University of Phoenix with a grade of A. Concurrent learning was challenging but worth it.

item.title: Background Agents System
item.description: Four persistent background agents auto-started via systemd on WSL2: night_watch (network/security, 5min), storage_watch (disk, 30min), docker_watch (containers, 5min), windows_space_watch (C: drive cleanup, 2h). Terminal banner shows green/red status on login.

item.title: NTC/300 Cloud Technologies — Grade A
item.description: Completed NTC/300 Cloud Technologies at University of Phoenix with a grade of A.

item.title: AI Tutor for Online Students
item.description: AI-powered tutor product built for online university students. TypeScript/Node stack.

item.title: Igris AI — 5-Phase Security Hardening Complete
item.description: Completed all 5 phases of security hardening on Igris AI assistant: foundation security modules, secrets migration to Windows Credential Manager (Argon2id), elimination of shell=True (41 instances), input validation at all entry points (5 layers), GUI and plugin patching.

item.title: Igris AI Assistant
item.description: Personal AI assistant — 22,000+ lines, 132 modules. 5-phase security hardening complete (secrets management, input validation, shell=True elimination, GUI/plugin hardening). Windows-primary. Memory backed by OneDrive JSON.

item.title: Gemini CLI Configuration
item.description: A note summarizing the configuration for the Gemini CLI. Includes the student workflow prompt and the PowerShell functions used to interact with the CLI.

item.title: Skylight App
item.description: Created a README. Migrated task and user models to asynchronous versions. Updated tabs. Streamlined database setup. Added placeholder tabs and a testing framework.

item.title: Gift Registry
item.description: Migrated data to Firestore and added email login. Refactored for Firebase v9. Set up Netlify deployment. Fixed CORS and Git push errors.

item.title: Night Audit Shift Wrap
item.description: Wrapped up the night audit shift. Reviewed Wireshark labs. Planned a Docker lesson.

item.title: Gemini CLI Setup Completed
item.description: Completed installation and configuration of Gemini CLI with PowerShell functions. Overcame CORS and database errors. Integrated the CLI into the study workflow.
